CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-458926 WITH CASE CGC-07-462488
Off Calendar Oct-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David W. Ammons of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-3954, appearing for defendant and responding party
Hong Chew of the Law Office of Hong Chew, 772-5558, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF XIANGMIN LI'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-458926 WITH CASE CGC-07-462488 is granted for all purposes, at this time, without prejudice to the parties to present their respective positions to the trial judge as to how the claims should be tried. The lead case on this matter will be case #458926. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Continued To Nov-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
